# Everton Freitas — Senior Full Stack Engineer

> Personal portfolio of Everton Freitas, a Senior Full Stack Engineer with 10+ years of experience building high-performance web products.

## About

Everton Freitas is a Brazilian software engineer specializing in frontend-heavy full stack development. He has worked at Luizalabs (Magazine Luiza), Kirvano, Mosaico/Buscapé and MaquiADORO. His core expertise spans React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python and Go — with a strong focus on Web Performance, CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization), AI integrations and Micro-frontends.

- Location: Brazil
- Experience: 10+ years
- Education: Computer Engineering, Universidade Federal do Ceará (UFC)
- Contact: https://everton7fr.space/#contact
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/evertonfr7
- GitHub: https://github.com/evertonfr7

## Skills

**Front-end:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML & CSS, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Material UI, shadcn/ui, Three.js

**Back-end:** Node.js, NestJS, Express, Python, Go, Django, Flask, Socket.IO, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL, Prisma

**Infrastructure:** Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform, GitHub Actions, GitLab Pipelines, CI/CD, Firebase, Nginx

**Observability:** Datadog, New Relic, Grafana, Google Analytics, Unleash

**AI & Productivity:** Spec-Driven Design, MCP Servers, AI-first workflows, Applied AI, Jupyter, Conda

**Quality & Architecture:** Core Web Vitals, A/B Testing, Unit Tests, Jest, Vitest, React Testing Library, Playwright, Micro-frontends, Accessibility (a11y), SonarQube, Scrum

## Work Experience

### Luizalabs (Feb 2025 – Apr 2026)
Senior Full Stack Engineer at the tech arm of Magazine Luiza, one of Brazil's largest retailers.
- Rebuilt the agency returns front-end — 300+ applications in the first launch week
- Developed AI-integrated admin module for candidate validation, reducing manual effort
- Introduced Spec-Driven Design and AI-first flows, accelerating dev cycles

### Kirvano (Nov 2023 – Dec 2024)
Frontend Engineer at a high-growth checkout platform.
- Drove +50% revenue growth through frontend improvements on the checkout flow
- Integrated AI-powered features across product journeys
- Implemented observability dashboards and feature flags at scale

### Mosaico / Buscapé (Nov 2021 – Nov 2023)
Frontend Engineer at Brazil's largest price comparison platform.
- Led full refactor of the search results page, improving conversion KPIs by 30%
- Reduced page load time from 4s to 1.2s through SSR optimization
- Built micro-frontend architecture serving millions of users

### MaquiADORO (Jun 2018 – Nov 2021)
Frontend Developer at a beauty e-commerce company.
- Elevated PageSpeed from 60 to 94 on mobile and desktop (57% improvement)
- Engineered a custom Design System from scratch
- Built an auditable internal financial system, increasing team productivity by 40%

## Notable Projects

- **Buscapé Refactor:** End-to-end refactor of the search results page. +30% conversion KPI.
- **MaquiADORO Design System:** Scalable component library. PageSpeed 60 → 94.
- **Luizalabs Agency System:** Centralized internal system managing agency operations for a major Brazilian retailer.

## Availability

Open for strategic consulting and high-impact projects.
